name: Trimble Agriculture Platform API
what_it_does: Trimble Agriculture REST API for precision agriculture, farm management, and connected field operations. Enables AI agents to manage field mapping and GPS boundary data for precision agriculture operations, handle prescription map creation and variable-rate application for input optimization, access yield monitoring and harvest data for crop performance analytics, retrieve soil sampling and analysis data for fertility management, manage equipment telematics and machinery performance data for fleet management, handle as-applied and as-planted data for agronomic record keeping, access weather and field condition data for farm decision support, retrieve agronomic advisory and scouting data for crop protection management, manage contractor and service provider coordination for farm operations, and integrate Trimble field data with farm management systems, cooperatives, and agronomy platforms.
use_cases: Automating prescription maps from precision ag agents
Analyzing yield data from harvest analytics agents
Managing equipment from farm fleet agents
Integrating field data from agronomy platform agents
not_for: Livestock operations without crop production focus
Food processing without field-level precision agriculture context
Non-agricultural land management without crop production
best_when: A large commercial grain or specialty crop operation using Trimble precision agriculture wants AI agents to automate prescription management, yield analysis, equipment telematics, and agronomic record keeping.
avoid_when: AGRONOMIC RISK: Automated prescription map generation for variable-rate application requires agronomist validation — incorrect application rates for fertilizer, pesticide, or seed create crop damage, regulatory pesticide violations, and yield loss. GPS guidance automation (auto-steer) is hardware-dependent; software integration must not override physical safety systems. Trimble has multiple agriculture product lines (Precision IQ, Farmer Core, Farmer Pro); API surface varies by product.

auth.notes: Trimble Agriculture uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.trimble.com. Webhooks for field and equipment events. REST API with JSON. Sunnyvale, California HQ (Trimble). Public (TRMB NASDAQ). Trimble Navigation acquired multiple ag technology companies including Farm Works Software and others. 400,000+ farm operations using Trimble precision ag. Strong in row crop and specialty crop precision agriculture. Competes with John Deere Operations Center and Climate Corporation for precision ag platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-acre or annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre annual subscription; equipment license fees
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale, California. Trimble (TRMB NASDAQ). Trimble Agriculture acquired multiple brands. 400,000+ farm operations. Precision IQ and Farmer Core/Pro are main platforms. Competes with John Deere Operations Center (MyJohnDeere), Bayer Climate Corporation, and CNH AFS for precision ag.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: AGRONOMIC RISK: Automated prescription map generation requires agronomist validation; incorrect variable-rate prescriptions create crop damage, pesticide violations, and yield loss
Pesticide label compliance — automated pesticide application prescriptions must comply with EPA label rates; exceeding label rates creates federal pesticide law violations
Hardware dependency — Trimble precision ag automation connects to Trimble display/controller hardware; software API changes must not override physical implement control safety interlocks
Multi-product line complexity — Trimble has multiple ag product lines (Precision IQ, Farmer Core, Farmer Pro, Trimble Agriculture) with different API surfaces; verify product integration path
Farm data ownership — AAFC (American Farm Bureau Farm Data Principles) governs farm data ownership; automated data sharing must respect farmer data ownership rights and consent
Seasonal data windows — field operations are highly seasonal; API load spikes during planting and harvest seasons; rate limits and performance may degrade during peak periods
agent_readiness.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Farm field and equipment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Precision ag. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Farm field and equipment data.
